bonuses.stat: Dealing damage to an enemy within 10 meters of you with a Heavy Attack causes you to throw a cone of knives, dealing 816 Physical damage to enemies hit. If an enemy hit has 50% Health or less, they also take an additional 1631 Bleed damage over 14 seconds. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
